Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class WorkDotComSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.WorkDotComSettings2
public class WorkDotComSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for WorkDotComSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="WorkDotComSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCoachingManagerGroupAccessEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsGoalManagerGroupAccessEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsProfileSkillsAddFeedPostEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsProfileSkillsAutoSuggestEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsProfileSkillsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsProfileSkillsUsePlatformEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsWorkBadgeDefRestrictPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsWorkCalibrationEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsWorkCanvasPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsWorkCertificationEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsWorkCertificationNotificationEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsWorkRewardsPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsWorkThanksPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsWorkUseObjectivesForGoalsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}WorkDotComSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
